findings.detail: switch-brand.live.test.ts exists and is a REAL live-Postgres integration test. Connects to postgres://brain:brain@localhost:5432/brain, seeds a 2-brand fixture user, calls switchBrandContext() on the wire. 4 tests ran (not skipped — Postgres available, no console.warn [SKIP] emitted): LIVE-SB-1 (context.brandId===B, context.role==='analyst', MA-01/MA-03), LIVE-SB-2 (brand.switch audit row written with from/to/workspace/role_granted, MA-09), LIVE-SB-3 [NEGATIVE] (archived brand throws AuthError BRAND_ARCHIVED, MA-10), LIVE-SB-4 [NEGATIVE] (non-member throws AuthError FORBIDDEN, MA-02). Captured output: 4 passed (4), 0 failed, exit 0, duration 48ms. Non-inert confirmed: SKIP_IF_NO_PG guard did not fire (Postgres is available); all 4 named assertions appear in verbose output.

6 new switchBrandContext unit tests appended to critical-paths.test.ts under 'QA-2: switchBrandContext — unit coverage' describe block. Tests cover: MA-01 (accessToken returned, no refreshSession user_session/family_id query called), MA-02 (context.workspaceId equals the arg), MA-03 (context.role='analyst' from brand-level row not org-level), MA-09 (audit.append called once with action='brand.switch' + from/to/workspace/role_granted payload), MA-10 [NEGATIVE] (archived brand throws AuthError BRAND_ARCHIVED 400), non-member [NEGATIVE] (throws FORBIDDEN 403; audit.append NOT called). All 6 use stub executor — no live PG required. Total suite: 53 passed (53), 0 failed (24 auth.service.test.ts + 22 critical-paths.test.ts + 3 family-wipe.live.test.ts + 4 switch-brand.live.test.ts). Tests are non-tautological: MA-09 asserts exact field values from spec, not from current output; FORBIDDEN/ARCHIVED tests require specific error class + code.

correlationId not stored in audit_log rows. Requires: (1) migration adding correlation_id column to audit_log, (2) AuditEntry interface update in @brain/audit, (3) DbAuditWriter.append() update. Deferred as tech-debt — out of this slice per engineering-os change-control (no cross-service migrations mid-bounce-fix). Not blocking PASS.

tools/isolation-fuzz/src/pg.test.ts line 600: assertion changed from toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0) (tautological) to toBeGreaterThan(0) (protective). The assertion now verifies that brand_self_read policy (0013) is functioning — if the policy were accidentally dropped, brandRowCount would be 0 and the test would FAIL. Comment at line 597 explicitly documents the original bug. Connector_instance negative-control (= 0 rows) unchanged. 11/11 pass, exit 0. Verified by grep: only toBeGreaterThan (not toBeGreaterThanOrEqual) appears at line 600.
Frontend Playwright E2E for brand-switcher UI not run — no browser environment. data-testid attributes are present. Orchestrator Playwright suite is the contracted gate. Not blocking.

tests_run.name: switch-brand.live.test.ts (QA-1 — 4 live Postgres tests)
tests_run.evidence: DATABASE_URL=postgres://brain:brain@localhost:5432/brain npx vitest run src/modules/workspace-access/tests/switch-brand.live.test.ts --reporter=verbose → 4 passed (4), 0 failed, exit 0. All 4 tests named and executed: LIVE-SB-1, LIVE-SB-2, [NEGATIVE] LIVE-SB-3, [NEGATIVE] LIVE-SB-4. No [SKIP] warnings. Duration 48ms.

tests_run.name: workspace-access full suite — 53 tests (QA-2 unit coverage included)
tests_run.evidence: DATABASE_URL=postgres://brain:brain@localhost:5432/brain npx vitest run src/modules/workspace-access/tests → 4 files, 53 passed (53), 0 failed, exit 0. auth.service.test.ts (24) + critical-paths.test.ts (22, includes 6 new switchBrandContext tests) + family-wipe.live.test.ts (3) + switch-brand.live.test.ts (4).

tests_run.name: isolation-fuzz pg.test.ts — 11/11 (QA-4 assertion fix)
tests_run.evidence: PG_USER=brain PG_PASSWORD=brain npx vitest run src/pg.test.ts → 11 passed (11), 0 failed, exit 0. AC-7 brand-table assertion now toBeGreaterThan(0) at line 600 (confirmed by grep). Negative-control proof: policy_on=0 rows, policy_off=1 rows — REAL enforcement on NOSUPERUSER NOBYPASSRLS connection. AC-7 isolation: brand_B session → connector_instance WHERE brand_id=A → 0 rows.

negative_control.protection_removed: ALTER TABLE isolation_test_rls DISABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY (inline verifyPolicyRemovalBreaksIsolation helper)
negative_control.command: PG_USER=brain PG_PASSWORD=brain npx vitest run src/pg.test.ts
negative_control.captured_red_output: policy_on=0 rows (expected 0), policy_off=1 rows (expected >0). RLS enforcement is REAL on non-superuser connection (isofuzz_app NOSUPERUSER NOBYPASSRLS).

negative_control.protection_removed: removing 'if (!row) throw FORBIDDEN' guard from switchBrandContext() causes LIVE-SB-4 to fail; removing archived guard causes LIVE-SB-3 to fail
negative_control.captured_red_output: Structural proof documented in test file header comment (lines 14-16). LIVE-SB-4 asserts error.code==='FORBIDDEN' — without the membership guard the method would proceed and no error would be thrown. LIVE-SB-3 asserts error.code==='BRAND_ARCHIVED' — without the archived check the method would mint a token for an archived brand.

negative_control.protection_removed: non-member executor returns 0 rows from membership; audit.append must NOT be called
negative_control.captured_red_output: MA-10 test: executor returns status='archived' for brand row → expects AuthError with code='BRAND_ARCHIVED'. Non-member test: executor returns 0 rows from membership → expects AuthError code='FORBIDDEN' + audit.append.not.toHaveBeenCalled(). Removing the guards would cause these tests to fail because the method would return a result instead of throwing.
